function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/config/soc_config.yaml", "file_text": "schema_version: 1

# ============================================================
# HEADER
# ============================================================
header:
  author: NC MCU Factory Requirements Agent
  copyright_holder: NC Factory
  license: Apache-2.0

# ============================================================
# SOC
# ============================================================
# Design: mspm33c321a_derivative
# Reference: Texas Instruments MSPM33C321A
# Derivative delta:
#   - Flash: 1MB → 512KB   (R-003)
#   - SRAM:  64KB → 128KB  (R-004)
#   - ADC:   2 → 1 instance (mixed-signal; outside NC_SOCGEN RTL) (R-005)
#   - I2C:   2 → 3 instances (+1 per brief) (R-006)
# ============================================================
soc:
  name: mspm33c321a_derivative
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss

  # Hazard3 RV32I — functional equivalent of ARM Cortex-M0+
  # Selected because:
  #   • NC framework is RISC-V only (D-001)
  #   • hazard3_2port_swd preserves 2-pin SWD debug (R-020)
  #   • 2-port variant enables XIP + SRAM simultaneous access
  cpu_type: hazard3_2port_swd

  # Package must exactly match package.name below
  package: LQFP64

  # 80 MHz — reference device spec (R-002)
  clock_hz: 80000000

  reset_active_low: true

  # hazard3_internal: built-in PLIC handles all peripheral IRQs (D-002)
  # nc_pic is NOT used with hazard3 CPU types
  interrupt_policy: hazard3_internal

# ============================================================
# MEMORY
# ============================================================
memory:
  # Flash: 512 KB (R-003 — reduced from reference 1MB)
  xip:
    enabled: true
    base_addr: 0x00000000
    size_bytes: 0x00080000    # 512 KB
    module: nc_xip

  # SRAM: 128 KB (R-004 — upgraded from reference 64KB)
  # Implemented as 4 × CF_SRAM_1024x32 banks (4 × 32KB = 128KB)
  # CF_SRAM_1024x32 included in link_IPs.json (D-008)
  sram:
    base_addr: 0x20000000
    size_bytes: 0x00020000    # 128 KB — power of 2 ✓
    module: nc_ahb_to_sram
    interface: ahb_lite
    model: cf
    sim_model: cf

# ============================================================
# FABRIC
# ============================================================
fabric:
  ahb:
    reserved_region_value: 0xBADB00B5
    # DMAC requires AHB master port — enabled for 8-channel DMA (R-013)
    with_dmac: true
    dmac_priority: true

  apb_auto:
    base_addr_start: 0x40000000
    slot_size: 0x1000         # 4 KB per peripheral slot
    slots_per_bus: 16
    # 26 peripheral APB slots needed → 2 buses required (D-004)
    min_buses: 2
    bus_stride: 0x00010000
    name_prefix: apb

  irq_auto:
    start: 0

  dma_auto:
    start: 0

  passthrough:
    clk_rst_pwr: true
    io_cfg_ss: true

# ============================================================
# PACKAGE
# ============================================================
# LQFP-64: 48 GPIO signal pads + 4 dedicated + 10 power = 62 + 2 corner = 64
# See docs/padframe_requirements.md for full pad breakdown
package:
  name: LQFP64
  io_pads: 52      # 48 GPIO + 4 dedicated (nRESET, CLK_IN, SWDCLK, SWDIO)
  power_pins: 10   # VDD×2, VSS×2, VDDIO×2, VSSIO×2, VDDA×1, VSSA×1

  # 3 × 16-pin GPIO ports — 48 GPIO total (R-018)
  gpio_ports:
    - name: gpioa
      width: 16
      reset_oe: input    # Safe power-on default: all pads high-impedance (D-011)
    - name: gpiob
      width: 16
      reset_oe: input
    - name: gpioc
      width: 16
      reset_oe: input

# ============================================================
# PERIPHERALS
# ============================================================
# Total APB slots used: 3+4+2+3+6+2+1+1+1+1+1+1 = 26
# Mapped to 2 APB buses (16 slots each = 32 total, 6 spare)
#
# ADC note (R-005): The remaining 12-bit SAR ADC instance is a
# mixed-signal block outside NC_SOCGEN. It is NOT listed here.
# Its digital interface (APB wrapper + IRQ) is to be added at
# physical integration stage.
peripherals:

  # --- GPIO (R-018): 3 ports × 16 pins = 48 GPIO ---
  - type: gpio
    module: nc_gpio
    count: 3            # gpioa (inst 0), gpiob (inst 1), gpioc (inst 2)
    instance_prefix: gpio

  # --- UART (R-009): 4 instances, unchanged from reference ---
  - type: uart
    module: nc_uart
    count: 4            # uart0–uart3
    instance_prefix: uart

  # --- SPI (R-010): 2 instances, unchanged from reference ---
  - type: spi
    module: nc_spi
    count: 2            # spi0–spi1
    instance_prefix: spi

  # --- I2C (R-006): 3 instances — reference 2 + derivative +1 ---
  # i2c2 is the new instance added per the derivative brief
  - type: i2c
    module: nc_i2c
    count: 3            # i2c0, i2c1 (reference), i2c2 (NEW — derivative addition)
    instance_prefix: i2c

  # --- General-Purpose Timers (R-011): 4 × 16-bit GP ---
  # --- Advanced Timers (R-012): 2 × 16-bit with PWM/dead-time ---
  # Both GP and advanced timers use nc_tmr; total 6 instances
  - type: tmr
    module: nc_tmr
    count: 6            # tmr0–tmr3 (GP), tmr4–tmr5 (advanced)
    instance_prefix: tmr

  # --- PWM (R-012): 2 instances from advanced timer outputs ---
  - type: pwm
    module: nc_pwm
    count: 2            # pwm0–pwm1
    instance_prefix: pwm

  # --- DMA Controller (R-013): 1 controller, 8 channels ---
  # Requires fabric.ahb.with_dmac: true (set above)
  - type: dmac
    module: nc_dmac
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: dmac

  # --- CRC Accelerator (R-014) ---
  - type: crc
    module: nc_crc
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: crc

  # --- AES Accelerator (R-015): AES-128/256 ---
  - type: aes
    module: nc_aes
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: aes

  # --- Windowed Watchdog Timer (R-016) ---
  - type: wwdt
    module: nc_wwdt
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: wwdt

  # --- Real-Time Clock (R-017): calendar + alarm ---
  - type: rtc
    module: nc_rtc
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: rtc

  # --- SysTick (D-009 / NC infrastructure) ---
  # ARM-compatible SysTick; required for RTOS tick
  - type: systick
    module: nc_systick
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: systick

  # NOTE: nc_pic is NOT included — hazard3_internal policy uses
  # the Hazard3 built-in PLIC for all interrupt management (D-002)

# ============================================================
# GENERATION
# ============================================================
generation:
  emit_padframe_handoff: true     # Required for pipeline beyond Stage 1 (nc_chipgen)
  emit_fw_pack: true
  emit_smoke: true
  emit_directed_tests: true
  emit_datasheet: true
  emit_csv: true
  emit_manifest: true
  emit_filelist: true
  emit_reg_spec: true
  smoke_sequence_format: verilog_include_calls
  verilog_standard: verilog-2005
  include_comments: true
  build_fw_smoke: true
  fw_signature_addr: 0x20000000
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

extras.new_content:
schema_version: 1

# ============================================================
# HEADER
# ============================================================
header:
  author: NC MCU Factory Requirements Agent
  copyright_holder: NC Factory
  license: Apache-2.0

# ============================================================
# SOC
# ============================================================
# Design: mspm33c321a_derivative
# Reference: Texas Instruments MSPM33C321A
# Derivative delta:
#   - Flash: 1MB → 512KB   (R-003)
#   - SRAM:  64KB → 128KB  (R-004)
#   - ADC:   2 → 1 instance (mixed-signal; outside NC_SOCGEN RTL) (R-005)
#   - I2C:   2 → 3 instances (+1 per brief) (R-006)
# ============================================================
soc:
  name: mspm33c321a_derivative
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss

  # Hazard3 RV32I — functional equivalent of ARM Cortex-M0+
  # Selected because:
  #   • NC framework is RISC-V only (D-001)
  #   • hazard3_2port_swd preserves 2-pin SWD debug (R-020)
  #   • 2-port variant enables XIP + SRAM simultaneous access
  cpu_type: hazard3_2port_swd

  # Package must exactly match package.name below
  package: LQFP64

  # 80 MHz — reference device spec (R-002)
  clock_hz: 80000000

  reset_active_low: true

  # hazard3_internal: built-in PLIC handles all peripheral IRQs (D-002)
  # nc_pic is NOT used with hazard3 CPU types
  interrupt_policy: hazard3_internal

# ============================================================
# MEMORY
# ============================================================
memory:
  # Flash: 512 KB (R-003 — reduced from reference 1MB)
  xip:
    enabled: true
    base_addr: 0x00000000
    size_bytes: 0x00080000    # 512 KB
    module: nc_xip

  # SRAM: 128 KB (R-004 — upgraded from reference 64KB)
  # Implemented as 4 × CF_SRAM_1024x32 banks (4 × 32KB = 128KB)
  # CF_SRAM_1024x32 included in link_IPs.json (D-008)
  sram:
    base_addr: 0x20000000
    size_bytes: 0x00020000    # 128 KB — power of 2 ✓
    module: nc_ahb_to_sram
    interface: ahb_lite
    model: cf
    sim_model: cf

# ============================================================
# FABRIC
# ============================================================
fabric:
  ahb:
    reserved_region_value: 0xBADB00B5
    # DMAC requires AHB master port — enabled for 8-channel DMA (R-013)
    with_dmac: true
    dmac_priority: true

  apb_auto:
    base_addr_start: 0x40000000
    slot_size: 0x1000         # 4 KB per peripheral slot
    slots_per_bus: 16
    # 26 peripheral APB slots needed → 2 buses required (D-004)
    min_buses: 2
    bus_stride: 0x00010000
    name_prefix: apb

  irq_auto:
    start: 0

  dma_auto:
    start: 0

  passthrough:
    clk_rst_pwr: true
    io_cfg_ss: true

# ============================================================
# PACKAGE
# ============================================================
# LQFP-64: 48 GPIO signal pads + 4 dedicated + 10 power = 62 + 2 corner = 64
# See docs/padframe_requirements.md for full pad breakdown
package:
  name: LQFP64
  io_pads: 52      # 48 GPIO + 4 dedicated (nRESET, CLK_IN, SWDCLK, SWDIO)
  power_pins: 10   # VDD×2, VSS×2, VDDIO×2, VSSIO×2, VDDA×1, VSSA×1

  # 3 × 16-pin GPIO ports — 48 GPIO total (R-018)
  gpio_ports:
    - name: gpioa
      width: 16
      reset_oe: input    # Safe power-on default: all pads high-impedance (D-011)
    - name: gpiob
      width: 16
      reset_oe: input
    - name: gpioc
      width: 16
      reset_oe: input

# ============================================================
# PERIPHERALS
# ============================================================
# Total APB slots used: 3+4+2+3+6+2+1+1+1+1+1+1 = 26
# Mapped to 2 APB buses (16 slots each = 32 total, 6 spare)
#
# ADC note (R-005): The remaining 12-bit SAR ADC instance is a
# mixed-signal block outside NC_SOCGEN. It is NOT listed here.
# Its digital interface (APB wrapper + IRQ) is to be added at
# physical integration stage.
peripherals:

  # --- GPIO (R-018): 3 ports × 16 pins = 48 GPIO ---
  - type: gpio
    module: nc_gpio
    count: 3            # gpioa (inst 0), gpiob (inst 1), gpioc (inst 2)
    instance_prefix: gpio

  # --- UART (R-009): 4 instances, unchanged from reference ---
  - type: uart
    module: nc_uart
    count: 4            # uart0–uart3
    instance_prefix: uart

  # --- SPI (R-010): 2 instances, unchanged from reference ---
  - type: spi
    module: nc_spi
    count: 2            # spi0–spi1
    instance_prefix: spi

  # --- I2C (R-006): 3 instances — reference 2 + derivative +1 ---
  # i2c2 is the new instance added per the derivative brief
  - type: i2c
    module: nc_i2c
    count: 3            # i2c0, i2c1 (reference), i2c2 (NEW — derivative addition)
    instance_prefix: i2c

  # --- General-Purpose Timers (R-011): 4 × 16-bit GP ---
  # --- Advanced Timers (R-012): 2 × 16-bit with PWM/dead-time ---
  # Both GP and advanced timers use nc_tmr; total 6 instances
  - type: tmr
    module: nc_tmr
    count: 6            # tmr0–tmr3 (GP), tmr4–tmr5 (advanced)
    instance_prefix: tmr

  # --- PWM (R-012): 2 instances from advanced timer outputs ---
  - type: pwm
    module: nc_pwm
    count: 2            # pwm0–pwm1
    instance_prefix: pwm

  # --- DMA Controller (R-013): 1 controller, 8 channels ---
  # Requires fabric.ahb.with_dmac: true (set above)
  - type: dmac
    module: nc_dmac
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: dmac

  # --- CRC Accelerator (R-014) ---
  - type: crc
    module: nc_crc
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: crc

  # --- AES Accelerator (R-015): AES-128/256 ---
  - type: aes
    module: nc_aes
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: aes

  # --- Windowed Watchdog Timer (R-016) ---
  - type: wwdt
    module: nc_wwdt
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: wwdt

  # --- Real-Time Clock (R-017): calendar + alarm ---
  - type: rtc
    module: nc_rtc
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: rtc

  # --- SysTick (D-009 / NC infrastructure) ---
  # ARM-compatible SysTick; required for RTOS tick
  - type: systick
    module: nc_systick
    count: 1
    instance_prefix: systick

  # NOTE: nc_pic is NOT included — hazard3_internal policy uses
  # the Hazard3 built-in PLIC for all interrupt management (D-002)

# ============================================================
# GENERATION
# ============================================================
generation:
  emit_padframe_handoff: true     # Required for pipeline beyond Stage 1 (nc_chipgen)
  emit_fw_pack: true
  emit_smoke: true
  emit_directed_tests: true
  emit_datasheet: true
  emit_csv: true
  emit_manifest: true
  emit_filelist: true
  emit_reg_spec: true
  smoke_sequence_format: verilog_include_calls
  verilog_standard: verilog-2005
  include_comments: true
  build_fw_smoke: true
  fw_signature_addr: 0x20000000
